code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut seen = "\n"
  mut count = 0
  mut start = 0 - 1
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_space = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(b)
        is_space = is_ws(b)
      when None
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(text, start, i)
        let key = "\n#{tok}\n"
        if not string.contains(seen, key)
          seen = "#{seen}#{tok}\n"
          count = count + 1
        end
        start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("unique=#{count}")
end
